zh.lifeSummary: 當Louis de Luxembourg I, de St Pol於1418年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德沙吉波爾-素-梅時，他的父親Pierre I de Luxembourg Comte de Brienne et de Saint-Pol28歲，母親Marguerite de Baux Contesse de Brienne et de Saint Pol24歲。他於1435年7月16日與Countess Jeanne Countess of Marle and Soissons de Bar在法國皮卡迪艾斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1475年12月19日在法國努維勒-阿吉泰吉洛德享年57歲，埋葬在法國瑟芭黎絲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Louis de Luxembourg I, de St Pol于1418年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德沙吉波爾-素-梅时，他的父亲Pierre I de Luxembourg Comte de Brienne et de Saint-Pol28岁，母亲Marguerite de Baux Contesse de Brienne et de Saint Pol24岁。他于1435年7月16日与Countess Jeanne Countess of Marle and Soissons de Bar在法国皮卡迪艾斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1475年12月19日在法国努維勒-阿吉泰吉洛德享年57岁，埋葬在法国瑟芭黎絲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Louis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

variants.name: Lewie
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Louis  , or a pet form of   Lewis .

variants.name: Louie
meanings: Variant spelling of   Lewie   or   Louis  , currently in fashion.

variants.name: Lewi
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

en.lifeSummary: When Louis de Luxembourg I, de St Pol was born in 1418, in Saint-Pol-sur-Mer, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Pierre I de Luxembourg Comte de Brienne et de Saint-Pol, was 28 and his mother, Marguerite de Baux Contesse de Brienne et de Saint Pol, was 24. He married Countess Jeanne Countess of Marle and Soissons de Bar on 16 July 1435, in Aisne, Picardie, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 19 December 1475, in Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, at the age of 57, and was buried in Paris, Seine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Louis de Luxembourg I, de St Pol est né en 1418, à Saint-Pol-sur-Mer, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Pierre I de Luxembourg Comte de Brienne et de Saint-Pol, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Baux Contesse de Brienne et de Saint Pol, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Countess Jeanne Countess of Marle and Soissons de Bar le 16 juillet 1435, à Aisne, Picardie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 19 décembre 1475, à Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Paris, Seine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Louis de Luxembourg I, de St Pol 1418 in Saint-Pol-sur-Mer, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Pierre I de Luxembourg Comte de Brienne et de Saint-Pol 28 und seine Mutter Marguerite de Baux Contesse de Brienne et de Saint Pol 24. Er hat am 16. Juli 1435 in Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich Countess Jeanne Countess of Marle and Soissons de Bar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 19. Dezember 1475 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich und wurde in Paris, Seine, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Louis de Luxembourg I, de St Pol è nato il nel 1418 nel Saint-Pol-sur-Mer, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Pierre I de Luxembourg Comte de Brienne et de Saint-Pol, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite de Baux Contesse de Brienne et de Saint Pol, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Countess Jeanne Countess of Marle and Soissons de Bar il 16 luglio 1435, nel Aisne, Picardie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 19 dicembre 1475, nel Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Paris, Seine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Louis de Luxembourg I, de St Polが1418年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードサイント-プオル-スル-マーで生まれた時，父Pierre I de Luxembourg Comte de Brienne et de Saint-Polは28歳，母Marguerite de Baux Contesse de Brienne et de Saint Polは24歳であった。1435年7月16日にフランスピカーディエイスンでCountess Jeanne Countess of Marle and Soissons de Barと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1475年12月19日にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインギロンドで57歳で死去し，フランスセアインパーイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Louis de Luxembourg I, de St Pol(이)가 1418년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 세인트-포-수-머에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Pierre I de Luxembourg Comte de Brienne et de Saint-Pol(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite de Baux Contesse de Brienne et de Saint Pol(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1435년 7월 16일 프랑스 피카디 아이스니에서 Countess Jeanne Countess of Marle and Soissons de Bar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1475년 12월 19일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 지론드에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세이인 파리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Louis de Luxembourg I, de St Pol nasceu em 1418, em Saint-Pol-sur-Mer, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Pierre I de Luxembourg Comte de Brienne et de Saint-Pol, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Baux Contesse de Brienne et de Saint Pol, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Countess Jeanne Countess of Marle and Soissons de Bar em 16 de julho de 1435, em Aisne, Picardie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de dezembro de 1475, em Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Paris, Seine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Louis de Luxembourg I, de St Pol родился в 1418 г. в местности сеинт-пол-сур-мир, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Pierre I de Luxembourg Comte de Brienne et de Saint-Pol было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Baux Contesse de Brienne et de Saint Pol, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Countess Jeanne Countess of Marle and Soissons de Bar 16 июля 1435 г. в местности эисн, пикарди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 19 декабря 1475 г. в местности гиронд, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности пэрис, син, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Louis de Luxembourg I, de St Pol nació en 1418, en Saint-Pol-sur-Mer, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Pierre I de Luxembourg Comte de Brienne et de Saint-Pol, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Baux Contesse de Brienne et de Saint Pol, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Countess Jeanne Countess of Marle and Soissons de Bar el 16 de julio de 1435, en Aisne, Picardie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 19 de diciembre de 1475, en Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Paris, Seine, Francia.
